title: Alone Through Iran: 1144 Miles of Trust
original_title: Alone through Iran: 1144 miles of trust
overview: The 45-year old Swedish woman, Kristina Paltén, ran across Iran to challenge her own prejudices against a culture and people she knew little about. She felt the very human need to trust in people.
